gate_metadata.sot_check: 3 of 3 suspicious items confirmed as shifted (not fabricated)

details.issue: source_text references daily_loss_limit (-0.03) on line 600, but extracted value is -0.1 which is position_stop_loss on line 601. Value is correct for position_stop_loss, but source_line and source_text point to wrong field.
source_line=1 points to title line '# VAMOS Cloud Library System...', but SPEC_VERSION '1.0' is actually on line 4 ('> **버전**: 1.0'). Value correct, source_line shifted.
source_line=1 points to title line '# VAMOS SDAR...', but SPEC_VERSION 'v1.0.0' is actually on line 3 ('> **버전**: v1.0.0'). Value correct, source_line shifted.

VAMOS_AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC.md.coverage_assessment: Good. Covers delegation constraints, cost ceilings V1/V2/V3, Sub-Agent types (8), LOCK decisions (17), DEFER items (5), enums (ModelTier, MessageType), key modules (InMemoryDispatcher, n8n+Flowise), scoring weights, timeouts.

VAMOS_AI_INVESTING_SPEC.md.coverage_assessment: Good. Covers core metrics (win rate 51%, Sharpe 1.0), data sources (83), strategies (96), circuit breakers, RSI_BB params (27), cost ceilings, Sharpe formula params, Z-Session performance/structure, contracts.py review (26 findings, 10 categories, 12 D-category). Back-half improved from 7% to 40%.

VAMOS_CLOUD_LIBRARY_SPEC.md.coverage_assessment: Good. Covers 10-Layer architecture, E-15/S-5 hybrid (2 modules, 10+20 functions, 30 total), 5-stage Gate (G0-G4), site evaluation scoring (100 points), approval tiers (4 levels), source trust weights (7 tiers), CB4 feasibility (86%), implementation timeline (10-15 months), daily version limit (5), code blocks (4).

VAMOS_SDAR_DESIGN_SPECIFICATION.md.coverage_assessment: Good. Covers 5-Layer Pipeline, AR-Level enum (5 levels), error categories (5: A-E), NEVER_AUTO actions (10 count + 10 item list), 7 immutable zones, 7-state machine, concurrency limits (3 instances), repair limits (3/hour), observation period (300s), snapshot retention (168h), module ID (I-25), version status (V1=OFF/V2=COND/V3=ON), cost budget reference, approval timeout (10min).

non_standard_keys.assessment: Domain-specific key for SDAR NEVER_AUTO actions count. Could map to TOTAL_MODULE_COUNT but loses semantic specificity. Acceptable with WARN.
Domain-specific key for SDAR NEVER_AUTO action names list. Could map to ENUM_VALUES but these are action identifiers not enum constants. Acceptable with WARN.
Domain-specific key for SDAR immutable zone count. Could map to TOTAL_MODULE_COUNT but 'immutable zone' is a distinct concept. Acceptable with WARN.

sv3_key_naming.improvement_note: Previous extraction (spec_3) had 6 non-standard keys (DV-8). This re-extraction reduced to 3 non-standard keys. All 3 are semantically justified domain-specific names.

items.issue: Source_text/source_line references daily_loss_limit field (-0.03) but value is -0.1 (position_stop_loss). Both fields exist in the same code block (lines 600-601). The extracted value -0.1 IS correct for position_stop_loss, but the source_text quotes the wrong line.

ad2_hallucinated_items.note: All 80 items verified against SOT. No fabricated values, no invented source references, no phantom sections.

items.description: 3 items have source_line pointing to nearby but not exact line. EA-11_027: line 600 vs 601 (off by 1). EA-11_056: line 1 vs 4 (title vs version metadata). EA-11_074: line 1 vs 3 (title vs version metadata).
3 domain-specific keys not in the C1-C8 standard key set. All are SDAR-specific (NEVER_AUTO_COUNT, NEVER_AUTO_LIST, IMMUTABLE_ZONE_COUNT). Semantically justified but technically non-standard.

TOTAL_MODULE_COUNT is used for 18 conceptually different counts (sub-agent types, LOCK decisions, DEFER items, data sources, strategies, sessions, layers, states, etc.). This is technically correct per the extraction key standard but reduces discriminability. Not a defect, but noted as a pattern.

results.finding: Value -0.1 matches position_stop_loss on line 601 (correct). Source_text quotes line 600 daily_loss_limit (incorrect reference). Context correctly says 'position_stop_loss'.

results.sot_content_line_1: # VAMOS Cloud Library System - 통합 상세 명세서
results.finding: Value '1.0' matches line 4 version metadata (correct). Source_line points to line 1 title (shifted by 3).
Value 'v1.0.0' matches line 3 version metadata (correct). Source_line points to line 1 title (shifted by 2).

action_required.action: Fix source_line from 600 to 601 and source_text from '"daily_loss_limit": -0.03,' to '"position_stop_loss": -0.10,'
Fix source_line from 1 to 4 and source_text to '> **버전**: 1.0'
Fix source_line from 1 to 3 and source_text to '> **버전**: v1.0.0 | **생성일**: 2026-02-23'

verdict_summary.rationale: 0 CRITICALs (no value mismatches, no hallucinations, no fabricated items). 3 shifted source references (EA-11_027, EA-11_056, EA-11_074) which is <=5 threshold for SILVER. 3 non-standard keys are domain-specific and semantically justified. All 80 extracted values are factually correct when verified against SOT. Re-extraction successfully resolved previous issues: DV-4 hallucinated source_text (17 items fixed), DV-8 non-standard keys reduced from 6 to 3, DV-10 AI_INVESTING back-half improved from 7% to 40%.

scores.sv2_completeness: 80 items across 4 SOT files, balanced coverage
scores.ad3_weaknesses: 3 shifted + 3 non-standard keys + generic key reuse pattern
